title: FIA Historic Database
notes: Official archive path used to capture Ford GT 40 FIA Recognition/Homologation No. 224 as S015; remains a target for future related forms and updates.

title: Ford media / Ford heritage public materials
notes: Primary target for Ford GT40 historical statements and heritage releases.

title: Ford Heritage Vault
notes: Official Ford archive/search site inspected directly; GT40 keyword search returned 84 records with textual, image, and moving-image filters. Use as a Ford archive acquisition path, not as a service-settings source by itself.

title: Ford GT40 Wikipedia article
notes: Used only to identify leads: GT40P/1075, 1968 rule context, component/source names.

title: Ford small block engine Wikipedia article
notes: Used only as a lead for 302/Gurney-Weslake claims; not used for action specs.

title: Weslake Wikipedia article
notes: Used only as a lead for Weslake/Gurney-Weslake claims; not used for action specs.

title: 1968 World Sportscar Championship Wikipedia article
notes: Used only as a lead for 1968 championship and rule context.

title: ZF transmission references
notes: Primary target for ZF 5DS-25 service data if this car uses ZF.

title: FIA Appendix J 1968 English PDF
notes: Primary FIA regulation source for 1968 categories, Group 4 sportscar recognition, displacement classes, recognition forms, and component constraints.

title: FIA Period Appendix J index
notes: Official FIA Historic Database index used to locate the 1968 Appendix J PDF.

title: FIA Homologation List index
notes: Official FIA Historic Database homologation list; exact Ford GT40 Mk I entry still needs capture from search or pagination.

title: Group 4 motorsport article
notes: Used only as a lead to FIA Appendix J and the claimed GT40 Mk I homologation entry; not used alone for shop specs.

title: 1968 24 Hours of Le Mans article
notes: Used only as a lead for 1968 race context and JWA/Gulf details; needs primary race or team records for authority.

title: FIA Historic Database Cars List and HTP guidance
notes: Primary FIA guidance that HTP event use requires an ASN-certified homologation form copy and that website forms are consultation-only.

title: FIA Ford GT 40 Homologation Form No. 224 Group 4
notes: Primary FIA record for Ford GT 40 Recognition/Homologation No. 224 Group 4 and linked PDF research copy; local archive sources/archive/S015-fia-ford-gt40-homologation-224.pdf; event use still requires ASN-certified copy per S014.

title: Hewland Classic LG500/LG600 manual
notes: Hewland Classic manual for LG500/LG600 transaxles; relevant to the S015 Hewland LG600 evolution only if the installed unit is verified as LG500/LG600 or directly compatible; local archive sources/archive/S016-hewland-lg500-lg600-manual.pdf.

title: Hewland Classic historic gearbox support pages
notes: Hewland Classic describes its licensed relationship with Hewland Engineering and support/spares coverage for classic Hewland gearboxes, including LG500 and LG600 pages; used to establish S016 source authority.

title: Webcon UK official Weber distributor and IDA support pages
notes: Official Weber distributor pages used for Weber IDA category, 46/48 IDA gasket/service/master rebuild kit evidence with product-code leads, and source-acquisition route for diagrams/manuals; does not verify installed carburetors or jetting.

title: FIA Appendix K 2025 updated 2026
notes: Current FIA Historic Database Appendix K listing and PDF used for modern historic-event safety and HTP context; local archive sources/archive/S019-fia-appendix-k-2025-updated-2026.pdf; applies from 2025 and is listed as updated 2026-01-01.

title: The Henry Ford Ford Motorsports Records
notes: Official archival collection record for Ford Motorsports Records; collection covers Ford racing/performance materials and includes 1957-1968 events/automobiles context, Le Mans keywording, and open research access; source-acquisition path only.

title: The Henry Ford Dave Friedman Collection
notes: Official archival collection record for Dave Friedman Collection; includes race photographs, documents, programs, car-detail files, press kits, and Ford GT40 / Le Mans / Dan Gurney keywords; source-acquisition path only.

title: The Henry Ford Remote Research Services
notes: Official remote research and duplication path for The Henry Ford/Benson Ford Research Center collections; useful for requesting S020/S021 materials, production records, part drawings, and page counts; not vehicle evidence by itself.

title: 24H Le Mans Winners and Records official track-record page
notes: Official 24H Le Mans / ACO all-time results and race-history source path; page payload exposes the palmares API used as S025 for the 1968 result row.

title: Gurney-Weslake official homepage
notes: Official Gurney-Weslake homepage used for cylinder-head development and identification context, including Mark I-IV development, GT40 race-head versus road-head boundary, and foundry/casting distinctions; not a service-settings source.

title: 24H Le Mans official palmares API - 1968 year result
notes: Official API endpoint used by the 24H Le Mans Winners and Records page; verifies the 1968 classified winning row for participant 9, JWA, Ford GT 40, Pedro Rodriguez, and Lucien Bianchi; does not expose engine displacement or lap count.
